title: The Ghost of the Mansion
logline: A small, shy ghost learns to overcome her fear of humans and finds a new friend.

shots.narration: A small, white glint flickers by the window, barely noticeable.
The glint grows larger, a warm light that seems to glow with a deep sadness.
The glint transforms into a small, wistful figure, hovering just outside the window.
The figure fades away until only the glint remains, a fading echo of a lost smile.
The glint shimmers, then solidifies into a small, trembling figure, holding onto a single, crumpled piece of paper.
The figure sits on the floor, the paper crumpled in her small hand, eyes wide and desperate.
A soft knock on the door causes a small stir within the figure, but she huddles deeper into the shadows.
The figure snatches the paper tightly, her eyes fixed on the creases, then dashes away into the darkness, the paper still clutched in her tiny hand.
The figure emerges from the shadows, the paper still clutched in her hand, standing at the window, eyes wide with trembling excitement.
